summary: Jason Tan is the founder of Engage AI, which aims to help introverted professionals promote themselves and become more confident in their communication. The project utilizes AI to provide guidance on writing and speaking. Tan's personal experience as an introvert and technical professional motivated him to build Engage AI.
build_signal: Engage AI, an AI-powered tool for introverted professionals (https://jpctan.substack.com/p/why-i-built-engage-ai)
thinking_signal: Tan's reasoning is centered around his personal experience and the potential of AI to help individuals become more visible and confident in their communication (https://jpctan.substack.com/p/why-i-built-engage-ai)
thesis_alignment: high, as Engage AI relates to AI agents and human discovery (https://jpctan.substack.com/p/why-i-built-engage-ai)
missing_evidence: information on the technical implementation of Engage AI

summary: The candidate has demonstrated interest and expertise in AI, product design, and UX, with a focus on analyzing the success and failure of social media apps and discussing the intersection of AI and product development. They have shown ability to reason about technical topics and design judgment. However, there is limited evidence of what they have actually shipped.
build_signal: The candidate has discussed building with AI and open source tools, as seen in the artifact about turning podcast transcripts into a playable RPG using AI.
thinking_signal: The candidate's reasoning is evident in their analysis of Clubhouse's FOMO strategy and retention rates, as well as their discussion of precision in expertise.
taste_signal: The candidate's design and product judgment is evident in their writing about AI, product design, and UX, with a focus on the importance of precision in expertise.
shipping_signal: There is limited evidence of what the candidate has actually shipped, with only low signals from the artifacts.
thesis_alignment: The candidate has shown connection to AI agents, with discussions of AI and its applications in product development and UX.
missing_evidence: Concrete examples of shipped products or projects
More in-depth discussion of human discovery, social technology, and memory systems
candidate_lacks: Strong evidence of hands-on building experience
In-depth discussion of search and HCI
candidate_strong_in: Analyzing social media apps and discussing AI and product development
signal_conflicts: Technical depth is rated as medium in one artifact, but low in another

summary: Jublia is a Singapore-based global leader in business matching and event data analytics, with a strong presence in the events industry. They empower organisers to match people and content intelligently and have a Hybrid Series, which includes virtual event series, case studies, and informative reads. However, their technical depth and narrative depth are relatively low.
build_signal: Jublia builds business matching and event data analytics platforms, as mentioned in https://medium.com/jublia/about
thinking_signal: No explicit information on their reasoning process is available, but their products suggest a focus on intelligent matching and data analysis
taste_signal: low, as indicated by the lack of unique or innovative design elements in their products and marketing materials
shipping_signal: high, as they have a strong presence in the events industry and have shipped multiple products, including their Hybrid Series, as mentioned in https://medium.com/jublia/all?topic=hybrid-series&source=---publication_nav-2a7df72d59e4-----0-----------------------------------
thesis_alignment: low, as there is no direct connection to AI agents, memory, human discovery, search, or HCI, although their intelligent matching technology may have some relevance
missing_evidence: information on their technical architecture, details on their intelligent matching algorithms, and data on their user engagement and retention
candidate_lacks: explicit statements on their design principles, technical whitepapers, and information on their research and development process
candidate_strong_in: event data analytics, business matching, and virtual event series
signal_conflicts: narrative depth is reported as low in some artifacts, but the presence of a Hybrid Series and informative reads suggests some level of narrative depth
